data: {"generalSituation":"The northeast monsoon now affecting the coast of Guangdong will moderate gradually today. A trough of low pressure over central China will edge closer to the coastal areas of southern China tomorrow. Meanwhile, upper-air disturbances will bring showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. A fresh to strong northeast monsoon will affect the coast of Guangdong during the weekend. The weather will be slightly cooler over the region. With the anticyclone aloft over the northern part of the South China Sea strengthening, the weather will improve over the coast of Guangdong early next week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Hagupit now in the vicinity of Guam is expected to develop gradually in the next few days, and move in the general direction of the seas east of the Philippines.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260507","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two isolated showers.
